JFK Blvd East near the corner of Baldwin St. (shown as Harbor Blvd on map but actual street sign says  Baldwin St.)

Row of crabapple trees on Blvd East between the Hess Station and the Police Station. I have never made jam or anything from them, nor tasted them, but I assume they are good to eat because they attract the groundhogs. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July
[1x] Little Linden Leaf, [1x] Swamp White Oak @ 288 10 Avenue
